name: Boboli Pizza Crust
recipeIngredient: 6 tbsp Olive oil, plus extra for panning
recipeInstructions:
1. Mix together the first six ingredients and let rise for 30-40 minutes.
2. Divide the dough into three parts and place in three olive-oiled pie pans.
3. Dimple the dough with your fingers.
4. Mix olive oil and water, then brush the tops of the pizzas with this mixture.
5. Sprinkle the toppings (sea salt, pepper, rosemary, and thyme) on top.
6. Let rise for 50 to 60 minutes.
7. Bake at 350°F for 25 minutes.
8. You may dip in olive oil before serving.
Note: This recipe has been checked and rechecked by Vivian Thiele (NRHF19C), but it hasn't been tried yet.
